title: Update footer attribution and add 360-degree vehicle images

requirements.summary: Update footer attribution line to read 'Built with using caffeine.ai Swaroop Team' while preserving all other footer content
acceptanceCriteria: The footer attribution line reads 'Built with using caffeine.ai Swaroop Team'
No other footer content (links, contact info, background color) is altered

file_operations.description: Update the attribution/credit line text to read 'Built with using caffeine.ai Swaroop Team'. Locate the existing credit text and replace it with the new attribution while keeping the deep-green background, brand info section, navigation links, and contact details unchanged.

requirements.summary: Replace vehicle card placeholder images with photorealistic 360-degree-style images for all six vehicles
acceptanceCriteria: Each vehicle card on the Vehicles page shows a unique photorealistic 360-degree-style image of that specific vehicle
All six vehicles (Innova Crysta, Fortuner, Ertiga, Tempo Traveller, Force Traveller, Luxury Coach) have distinct images
Card content (name, type, capacity, features, badge) remains unchanged
Images are responsive and maintain aspect ratio within their cards

file_operations.description: Replace the current placeholder image references on each of the six vehicle cards with the corresponding generated 360-degree vehicle images. Use the workspace paths: frontend/public/assets/generated/innova-crysta-360.dim_800x500.png for Innova Crysta, frontend/public/assets/generated/fortuner-360.dim_800x500.png for Fortuner, frontend/public/assets/generated/ertiga-360.dim_800x500.png for Ertiga, frontend/public/assets/generated/tempo-traveller-360.dim_800x500.png for Tempo Traveller, frontend/public/assets/generated/force-traveller-360.dim_800x500.png for Force Traveller, and frontend/public/assets/generated/luxury-coach-360.dim_800x500.png for Luxury Coach. Ensure the image elements maintain responsive sizing and aspect ratio within their card containers. Do not modify vehicle names, capacity, features list, or badge labels.
